query:
-- Ver todos os DI PERCENTUAL no banco para sanidade
SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, indexador, zspread, taxaIndicativa, rating
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = '2026-03-30' AND indexador LIKE '%PERCENTUAL%';

-- Ver range de zspread por indexador para detectar mistura
SELECT indexador, 
  MIN(zspread) as min_z, 
  MAX(zspread) as max_z, 
  AVG(zspread) as avg_z,
  COUNT(*) as qtd
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = '2026-03-30'
GROUP BY indexador;
